specFidelityNotes: Issue #407 Phase 2.6 exit gate: Playwright suite covers Home→Decisions journey, Manual Refresh, desktop/mobile-web IA parity, axe/a11y, Vietnamese locale, assistance regression, demo-e2e CI job, and contract pytest. ADR-026 honored — no hard dependency on Analytics #404 or Settings #405. Minimal app hooks: ?load=error, sr-only unavailable chart labels, useParams on in-progress detail.
